name: esc_backslash_backslash
note: S1: \\ collapses to a single backslash
source:
---
allow_unused: true

params:
  - s = str := "a\\b"
---
x

name: esc_escaped_double_quote
note: S2: \" is a literal double quote inside a double-quoted string
source:
---
allow_unused: true

params:
  - s = str := "a\"b"
---
x

name: esc_escaped_single_quote
note: S3: \' is a literal single quote
source:
---
allow_unused: true

params:
  - s = str := "a\'b"
---
x

name: esc_verbatim_backslash_sequences
note: S4: unrecognised \X sequences are kept verbatim (backslash preserved)
source:
---
allow_unused: true

params:
  - s = str := "c:\\path\\n"
---
x

name: esc_verbatim_single_backslash
note: S4b: a single backslash before a letter is verbatim
source:
---
allow_unused: true

params:
  - s = str := "c:\path"
---
x

name: esc_escaped_quote_no_list_split
note: S5: an escaped quote does NOT split a list literal (2 items)
source:
---
allow_unused: true

params:
  - xs = list(str) := ["a\", b", "c"]
---
x

name: esc_composes_with_interpolation_match
note: escaped quotes + {{ }} interpolation compose inside a condition string (match)

name: esc_composes_with_interpolation_nomatch
note: escaped quotes + {{ }} interpolation compose inside a condition string (no match)
